GetPurchasableDiskInformationNew.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
GetPurchasableDiskInformationNew.zoneName: Zone information. The zoneName naming convention is "country-region-availability-zone", in lowercase. For example, Beijing Zone A is "cn-bj-a".
